questionHtml:
For what purpose is a karyogram used?

A. To identify gene loci in a species

B. To identify linked genes in the chromosomes of an individual

C. To identify the genome size of a species

D. To identify abnormal chromosomes in an individual

meta.title: For what purpose is a karyogram used? A. To identify gene loci in a species B. To identify linked genes in the chromosomes of an individual C. To identify the genome size of a spec
